title: ReasonBench: Benchmarking Long-Horizon Reasoning Agents
abstract: We introduce a benchmark for long-horizon language model reasoning agents with multi-step tasks, trajectory-level evaluation, and ablation studies.

title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting for Language Agents
abstract: This preprint studies chain-of-thought prompting for agent planning and reasoning with qualitative case studies and benchmark evaluation.

title: ActionPlanner: Peer-Reviewed Planning for LLM Agents
abstract: We present a peer-reviewed agent architecture for reasoning and acting with benchmark results, ablation analysis, and error taxonomy.

title: Survey of Language Model Reasoning Agents
abstract: This systematic review organizes the literature on reasoning agents, benchmark design, planning modules, execution feedback, and evaluation practices.
